heading: Modification of project
label: 704 Modification of project
text: The project for the control of floods in the Sacramento River, California, adopted by , is modified in accordance with the report of the California Débris Commission submitted in Senate Document Numbered 23, Sixty-ninth Congress, first session: , That the total amounts contributed by the Federal Government, including the amounts heretofore contributed by it, shall in no event exceed in the aggregate $17,600,000.section 703 of this titleProvided
